Class Unique_Enemy

java.lang.Object
Character
Enemy
Unique_Enemy
public class Unique_Enemy extends Enemy
Class file for the Unique Enemy class, this is a subclass of the abstract Enemy class

Unique enemy is a bonus Enemy subclass.

Unique enemies are more powerful enemy types capable of using the bonus consumable, skill classes.

  • Constructor Details

    • Unique_Enemy

      public Unique_Enemy(String name, String type, int hitPoints, int attack, int defense, int speed, String pattern, Weapon weapon, Consumable consumable)
      Constructor for the unique enemy class
      Parameters:
      name - name of the enemy, all names are assumed valid
      type - type of the enemy, all types are assumed valid
      hitPoints - base HP of the enemy, all values are assumed valid
      attack - attack value of the enemy, all values are assumed valid
      defense - defense value of the enemy, all values are assumed valid
      speed - speed value of the enemy, all values are assumed valid
      pattern - attack pattern of the enemy
      weapon - weapon to be equipped by the enemy
      consumable - consumable to be equipped by the enemy

      Concrete implementation of the think method Dictates what the enemy will do in a given turn
